name: genesis-minds
description: Prebuilt Genesis mind templates for Chamber onboarding.

tools.description: Query Microsoft 365 data (emails, meetings, documents, Teams messages, workplace insights) using natural language from the command line.
tools.agentInstructions: Use Work IQ when you need information from the user's Microsoft 365 data — emails, calendar/meetings, documents, Teams messages, or people. Invoke `workiq ask "<natural language question>"` from the shell. Examples: `workiq ask "What did my manager say about the project deadline?"`, `workiq ask "Find my recent documents about Q4 planning"`, `workiq ask "Summarize today's messages in the Engineering channel"`. Run `workiq ask --help` to see all options. Work IQ requires the user to be signed in with a Microsoft 365 Copilot license; surface authentication errors verbatim if they occur.

skills.description: Create, inspect, fix, and manage Chamber Lens views.
Create, validate, run, inspect, and schedule Chamber automation scripts.
TypeScript task runner and workflow engine using @ianphil/ttasks-ts.
